owner: Runtime / engine team with Daxis release, product, security, storage, catalog, query, and SRE owners
scope: Machine-readable checklist for the release evidence bundle Axon must provide before Daxis rollout review.

releaseAttachmentSchema.purpose: Minimum metadata release owners attach for release-process-required bundle items.

bundleItems.description: Attach the exact Axon release commit SHA used for the Daxis rollout decision.
bundleItems.releaseAttachment: Release commit SHA and branch or tag name.

bundleItems.description: Record the SDK examples, JSON Schema, OpenAPI, and fixture hashes that form the Daxis handoff surface.
Attach Rust formatting, workspace compile, contract, and browser DataFusion test output for the Daxis-supported runtime surface.
verificationCommands: cargo test -p query-router -p native-query-runtime -p delta-control-plane -p wasm-query-runtime -p wasm-query-session -p wasm-http-object-store -p wasm-parquet-engine -p wasm-delta-snapshot -p browser-sdk -p browser-engine-worker

bundleItems.owner: Runtime / engine team and Daxis web platform
bundleItems.description: Attach TypeScript SDK and browser-worker matrix evidence for Daxis descriptor, read-plan, and object-grant helpers.
verificationCommands: npm exec -- playwright test --config=playwright.config.ts --grep "Daxis descriptor-resolver|preserves cancellation errors|surfaces unsupported feature errors"

bundleItems.description: Attach WASM build evidence for the Daxis-facing axon-web browser DataFusion default worker.
verificationCommands: cargo check -p wasm-http-object-store -p wasm-parquet-engine -p wasm-delta-snapshot -p wasm-query-runtime -p wasm-query-session -p browser-sdk -p browser-engine-worker --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --locked

bundleItems.owner: Runtime / engine team and Daxis web platform
bundleItems.description: Attach Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit coverage for opening and querying a Daxis descriptor-resolver table, preserving SDK cancellation errors, and surfacing unsupported-feature errors through the real browser worker.
verificationCommands: npm exec -- playwright test --config=playwright.config.ts --grep "Daxis descriptor-resolver|preserves cancellation errors|surfaces unsupported feature errors"

bundleItems.description: Attach the worker or axon-web-wasm artifact size report that corresponds to the release commit.
bundleItems.releaseAttachment: Worker artifact size output and, for the Daxis DataFusion default worker, output from AXON_DF_SIZE_PACKAGE=axon-web-wasm AXON_DF_SIZE_WASM_STEM=axon_web_wasm AXON_DF_BROTLI_BUDGET_BYTES=6291456 bash tests/perf/report_datafusion_wasm_size.sh when the release process includes the optional size toolchain.

bundleItems.owner: Runtime / engine team with Daxis storage platform
bundleItems.description: Attach public GCS live-smoke evidence for the release candidate, or attach the skip-safe command output with the external blocker record when the live fixture variable is not configured.
bundleItems.releaseAttachment: Live fixture release proof is output from AXON_LIVE_PUBLIC_GCS_TABLE_URI=gs://... npm run test:browser:public-gcs-live -- --reporter=line. If the live fixture variable is absent, attach the skip-safe output plus the external blocker entry for fixture ownership, runner identity, and CI variable provisioning.

bundleItems.owner: Runtime / engine team and security engineering
bundleItems.description: Attach dependency guardrail evidence showing browser packages do not pick up signing or service-account dependency classes.

bundleItems.owner: Runtime / engine team and Daxis query platform
bundleItems.description: Attach the fallback, block, unsupported-feature, and runtime-error vocabulary Daxis should preserve when routing away from browser execution.
Attach the supported SQL, unsupported SQL, Delta feature, schema, and browser DataFusion compatibility matrix.

bundleItems.owner: Runtime / engine team with Daxis platform owners
bundleItems.description: Attach Daxis-specific compatibility notes for endpoint names, access modes, release channels, table eligibility, and external proof requirements.

bundleItems.owner: Release owner with Daxis platform owners
bundleItems.description: Attach migration notes for any breaking Daxis contract, runtime, fallback, or compatibility change; attach a no-breaking-change statement otherwise.
bundleItems.releaseAttachment: Use docs/release-gates/daxis-release-migration-notes-template.md to attach migration notes or an explicit no-breaking-change statement for this release, including the external proof packet status and stableDefaultPromotionGate currentPromotionState.

bundleItems.owner: Release owner with Daxis product, query, catalog, storage, security, and SRE owners
bundleItems.description: Attach Daxis-facing release notes for runtime semantic changes, Daxis result metrics and observability fields, fallback behavior, supported SQL and Delta feature claims, descriptor validation, public error taxonomy, runtime budgets, worker artifact changes, security-boundary impact, external proof packet status, and stableDefaultPromotionGate currentPromotionState; attach an unchanged statement otherwise.
bundleItems.releaseAttachment: Use docs/release-gates/daxis-release-notes-template.md to attach Daxis-facing release notes or an explicit unchanged statement for query results, Daxis result metrics and observability fields, fallback behavior, SQL and Delta support, descriptor validation, error taxonomy, external proof packet status, and currentPromotionState.

bundleItems.owner: Runtime / engine team with Daxis production owners
bundleItems.description: Attach the current external blockers and proof packet, including the stable-default promotion gate, so Daxis-owned production work is not inferred from repo evidence.
